tiktok.caption: Your pharmacist has a $4 version of that $80 pill. Same drug. FDA says so. You just have to ask.

youtube_short.title: Your $80 Pill Has a $4 Identical Twin
title_alternatives: FDA Says This $4 Pill = Your $80 Prescription
Big Pharma's $600/Year Tax Nobody Talks About
youtube_short.description: Your pharmacist has a $4 version of that $80 pill and they never told you. The FDA requires generics to be bioequivalent — same active ingredient, same dose, same absorption rate. Big Pharma spends $6 billion a year on advertising to make sure you distrust the generic version. Americans overpay $600 per year and $50 billion nationally because of this one belief. Just ask your pharmacist four words: 'Is there a generic?' Or search your medication at costplusdrugs.com — drugs that cost $80 at retail are often $3-4 there. Follow for the money traps nobody warns you about. #personalfinance #moneytips #genericdrugs #pharmacyhack #savemoney

hook_line: Your $80 pill costs $4 at the same factory
